text_original:
I go out at the north gate,
With my heart full of sorrow.
Straitened am I and poor,
And no one takes knowledge of my distress.
So it is!
Heaven has done it;—
What
then shall I say?
text_normalized:

Heaven has done it;—

then shall I say?
